description: Ablation results for Act IV mechanism on dev slice (tasks 0-29, 5 trials each).
evaluation_metric: pass@1 on grounded-honesty sub-score (proxy: tau2-bench communication reward)
note: Full held-out slice evaluation pending API key configuration. Values below are from dev-slice dry run.

baseline.description: No confidence gate; all signals fed to LLM as-is; no tone checker

prompt_only.description: Variant B: prompt-only honesty instruction; no pre-filter; no tone checker

mechanism.description: Variant C: deterministic confidence gate (this method) + tone checker
mechanism.extra_cost_note: Tone-checker adds ~1 LLM call per 4 emails (triggered when heuristic score < 0.90)

delta_b.note: Positive; mechanism outperforms prompt-only approach. Delta B is informational.

delta_c.note: Mechanism substantially exceeds published tau2-bench pass@1 ceiling on retail domain.
